Interactive command-line interface for managing Pebble devices, with logging and command dispatching.

# Purpose
The `InteractivePebbleCommander` class provides an interactive command-line interface for managing and executing commands related to the `PebbleCommander` system. It is designed to be used directly or subclassed by user interface implementations that require interactive command execution. The class initializes a `PebbleCommander` instance and a `LogDehash` instance to handle command execution and log message dehashing, respectively. It also sets up a command-line interface using the `prompt_toolkit` library to facilitate user input and command dispatching.

The class includes several methods to manage the command loop, handle user input, and process log messages. The [`dispatch_command`](<#InteractivePebbleCommanderdispatch_command>) method interprets and executes command strings, while the [`input_handle`](<#InteractivePebbleCommanderinput_handle>) method processes input lines, including handling specific commands like "exit" or "quit" to terminate the session. The [`log_listener`](<#InteractivePebbleCommanderlog_listener>) method processes incoming log messages by dehashing them and formatting them for display. The [`command_loop`](<#InteractivePebbleCommandercommand_loop>) method runs the main loop for receiving and executing commands, and it can be overridden by subclasses if necessary. The class also manages resources by implementing context management methods ([`__enter__`](<#InteractivePebbleCommander__enter__>), [`__exit__`](<#InteractivePebbleCommander__exit__>), and [`__del__`](<#InteractivePebbleCommander__del__>)) to ensure proper cleanup.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `__future__.absolute_import`
- `shlex`
- `traceback`
- `log_hashing.logdehash.LogDehash`
- `prompt_toolkit`
- `.commander.PebbleCommander`

#### InteractivePebbleCommander\.\_\_init\_\_<!-- {{#callable:pebble-firmware/python_libs/pebble-commander/pebble/commander/interactive.InteractivePebbleCommander.__init__}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../python_libs/pebble-commander/pebble/commander/interactive.py#L30>)

Initializes an instance of `InteractivePebbleCommander` with a [`PebbleCommander`](<../../../../tools/commander/commander.py.md#PebbleCommander>) and a [`LogDehash`](<../../../../tools/log_hashing/logdehash.py.md#LogDehash>), and attaches a log listener.
- **Inputs**:
    - `loghash_path`: The file path to the log hash dictionary, defaulting to 'build/src/fw/loghash_dict.json' if not provided.
    - `tty`: The terminal type for the [`PebbleCommander`](<../../../../tools/commander/commander.py.md#PebbleCommander>), default is `None`.
    - `capfile`: The capture file for the [`PebbleCommander`](<../../../../tools/commander/commander.py.md#PebbleCommander>), default is `None`.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Creates a [`PebbleCommander`](<../../../../tools/commander/commander.py.md#PebbleCommander>) instance with `tty`, `interactive=True`, and `capfile` as arguments.
    - Checks if `loghash_path` is `None` and assigns a default path if true.
    - Creates a [`LogDehash`](<../../../../tools/log_hashing/logdehash.py.md#LogDehash>) instance with `loghash_path`.
    - Attaches the `log_listener` method as a log listener to the [`PebbleCommander`](<../../../../tools/commander/commander.py.md#PebbleCommander>) instance.
- **Output**: None (constructor method).
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`pebble-firmware/tools/commander/commander.PebbleCommander`](<../../../../tools/commander/commander.py.md#PebbleCommander>)
    - [`pebble-firmware/tools/log_hashing/logdehash.LogDehash`](<../../../../tools/log_hashing/logdehash.py.md#LogDehash>)
    - [`pebble-firmware/tools/commander/commander.PebbleCommander.attach_log_listener`](<../../../../tools/commander/commander.py.md#PebbleCommanderattach_log_listener>)
- **See also**: [`pebble-firmware/python_libs/pebble-commander/pebble/commander/interactive.InteractivePebbleCommander`](<#InteractivePebbleCommander>)  (Base Class)

#### InteractivePebbleCommander\.attach\_prompt\_toolkit<!-- {{#callable:pebble-firmware/python_libs/pebble-commander/pebble/commander/interactive.InteractivePebbleCommander.attach_prompt_toolkit}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../python_libs/pebble-commander/pebble/commander/interactive.py#L52>)

Initializes and configures the prompt_toolkit components for command line interaction.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Creates an in-memory history object using `prompt_toolkit.history.InMemoryHistory` and assigns it to `self.history`.
    - Initializes a `CommandLineInterface` object with a prompt application and event loop, assigning it to `self.cli`.
    - Creates a patch context for standard output using `self.cli.patch_stdout_context` with `raw=True` and enters the context.
- **Output**: No output is returned; the method sets up internal state for command line interaction.
- **See also**: [`pebble-firmware/python_libs/pebble-commander/pebble/commander/interactive.InteractivePebbleCommander`](<#InteractivePebbleCommander>)  (Base Class)

#### InteractivePebbleCommander\.log\_listener<!-- {{#callable:pebble-firmware/python_libs/pebble-commander/pebble/commander/interactive.InteractivePebbleCommander.log_listener}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../python_libs/pebble-commander/pebble/commander/interactive.py#L63>)

Processes incoming log messages by dehashing and formatting them before printing.
- **Inputs**:
    - `msg`: The raw log message that needs processing.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Call the [`dehash`](<../../../../tools/log_hashing/logdehash.py.md#LogDehashdehash>) method of the `dehasher` object with `msg` to convert the raw log message into a dictionary format.
    - Call the [`commander_format_line`](<../../../../tools/log_hashing/logdehash.py.md#LogDehashcommander_format_line>) method of the `dehasher` object with the resulting dictionary to format the log message into a string.
    - Print the formatted log message.
- **Output**: None, but it prints the formatted log message to the standard output.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`pebble-firmware/tools/log_hashing/logdehash.LogDehash.dehash`](<../../../../tools/log_hashing/logdehash.py.md#LogDehashdehash>)
    - [`pebble-firmware/tools/log_hashing/logdehash.LogDehash.commander_format_line`](<../../../../tools/log_hashing/logdehash.py.md#LogDehashcommander_format_line>)
- **See also**: [`pebble-firmware/python_libs/pebble-commander/pebble/commander/interactive.InteractivePebbleCommander`](<#InteractivePebbleCommander>)  (Base Class)

#### InteractivePebbleCommander\.dispatch\_command<!-- {{#callable:pebble-firmware/python_libs/pebble-commander/pebble/commander/interactive.InteractivePebbleCommander.dispatch_command}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../python_libs/pebble-commander/pebble/commander/interactive.py#L73>)

Dispatches a command string to either execute a command or send it to the prompt.
- **Inputs**:
    - `string`: A command string to be processed.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Splits the input `string` into arguments using `shlex.split`.
    - Checks if the `string` starts with '!', indicating it should be sent directly to the prompt after removing the '!'.
    - If the `string` does not start with '!', attempts to retrieve a command using `self.cmdr.get_command` with the first argument.
    - If a command is found, executes the command with the remaining arguments.
    - If no command is found or the `string` starts with '!', sends the `string` to the prompt using `self.cmdr.send_prompt_command`.
- **Output**: Returns the result of the executed command or the result of sending the command to the prompt.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`pebble-firmware/tools/commander/commander.PebbleCommander.get_command`](<../../../../tools/commander/commander.py.md#PebbleCommanderget_command>)
    - [`pebble-firmware/tools/commander/commander.PebbleCommander.send_prompt_command`](<../../../../tools/commander/commander.py.md#PebbleCommandersend_prompt_command>)
- **See also**: [`pebble-firmware/python_libs/pebble-commander/pebble/commander/interactive.InteractivePebbleCommander`](<#InteractivePebbleCommander>)  (Base Class)

#### InteractivePebbleCommander\.input\_handle<!-- {{#callable:pebble-firmware/python_libs/pebble-commander/pebble/commander/interactive.InteractivePebbleCommander.input_handle}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../python_libs/pebble-commander/pebble/commander/interactive.py#L90>)

Handles an input line by processing UI-specific commands and dispatching other commands.
- **Inputs**:
    - `string`: The input line to handle, which can be a command or a UI-specific string like 'exit', 'q', or 'quit'.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Check if the input string is one of the quit commands ('exit', 'q', 'quit').
    - If the input string is a quit command, return False to indicate termination.
    - Try to dispatch the command using the [`dispatch_command`](<#InteractivePebbleCommanderdispatch_command>) method.
    - If [`dispatch_command`](<#InteractivePebbleCommanderdispatch_command>) returns a response, print the response in bold format.
    - If an exception occurs during command dispatch, print an error message and the traceback.
    - Return True to indicate successful handling of the input line.
- **Output**: Returns False if the input string is a quit command, otherwise returns True.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`pebble-firmware/python_libs/pebble-commander/pebble/commander/interactive.InteractivePebbleCommander.dispatch_command`](<#InteractivePebbleCommanderdispatch_command>)
- **See also**: [`pebble-firmware/python_libs/pebble-commander/pebble/commander/interactive.InteractivePebbleCommander`](<#InteractivePebbleCommander>)  (Base Class)

#### InteractivePebbleCommander\.get\_command<!-- {{#callable:pebble-firmware/python_libs/pebble-commander/pebble/commander/interactive.InteractivePebbleCommander.get_command}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../python_libs/pebble-commander/pebble/commander/interactive.py#L111>)

Retrieves a command input line from the command line interface, returning the text of the command or None if no command is available.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Checks if `self.cli` is None, and if so, calls [`attach_prompt_toolkit`](<#InteractivePebbleCommanderattach_prompt_toolkit>) to initialize the command line interface.
    - Runs the command line interface with `reset_current_buffer=True` to get a document object.
    - Checks if the document object is not None, and if so, returns the text of the document.
    - Returns None if the document object is None.
- **Output**: Returns the text of the command input line or None if no command is available.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`pebble-firmware/python_libs/pebble-commander/pebble/commander/interactive.InteractivePebbleCommander.attach_prompt_toolkit`](<#InteractivePebbleCommanderattach_prompt_toolkit>)
    - [`pebble-firmware/tools/log_hashing/logdehash.LogDehash.run`](<../../../../tools/log_hashing/logdehash.py.md#LogDehashrun>)
- **See also**: [`pebble-firmware/python_libs/pebble-commander/pebble/commander/interactive.InteractivePebbleCommander`](<#InteractivePebbleCommander>)  (Base Class)

#### InteractivePebbleCommander\.command\_loop<!-- {{#callable:pebble-firmware/python_libs/pebble-commander/pebble/commander/interactive.InteractivePebbleCommander.command_loop}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../python_libs/pebble-commander/pebble/commander/interactive.py#L126>)

Executes a continuous loop to process user commands until a termination condition is met.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Enters an infinite loop to continuously process commands.
    - Within the loop, attempts to retrieve a command using `get_command()`.
    - If a command is retrieved and `input_handle(cmd)` returns `False`, the loop breaks, terminating the command loop.
    - Catches `KeyboardInterrupt` and `EOFError` exceptions to break the loop and exit gracefully.
- **Output**: No explicit output; the function controls the flow of command processing and termination.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`pebble-firmware/python_libs/pebble-commander/pebble/commander/interactive.InteractivePebbleCommander.get_command`](<#InteractivePebbleCommanderget_command>)
    - [`pebble-firmware/python_libs/pebble-commander/pebble/commander/interactive.InteractivePebbleCommander.input_handle`](<#InteractivePebbleCommanderinput_handle>)
- **See also**: [`pebble-firmware/python_libs/pebble-commander/pebble/commander/interactive.InteractivePebbleCommander`](<#InteractivePebbleCommander>)  (Base Class)
